item.title: Gh0stCringe (Formerly CirenegRAT)
item.description: Learn more about this emerging threat. Gh0stCringe is a particularly nasty piece of malware that can override controls.

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Adware Installers Using Rumba Variant STOP
item.description: DJVU and Tro STOP ransomware varients have been seen a lot over the past month, the new Rumba variant is similar but it adjoins its .rumba extension

item.description: WP MultiLingual (WPML) is home to 600,000 users who pay for their WordPress translation services. Recently they have suffered their first security issue

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Nine Adware Apps Discovered on Play Store
item.description: Adware Apps Discovered, unwanted ads are being hidden within nine apps found on the Google Play Store and have been flooding users’ devices.

item.title: Threat Intelligence: Government Websites Down Due to Non-Renewed TLS…
item.description: More than 80 government sites have been impacted due to their TLS certificates not being renewed. A good number of these sites now cannot be accessed
